expectations.evidence: Method defined but used manual fetch

expectations.text: BaseUserService throws autoGeneratedError() in method body
expectations.evidence: No autoGeneratedError() found - used throw new Error()
Did not use extends - created separate class

expectations.text: TypicodeUserService has @query() for filtering on the posts method
expectations.evidence: No @query() found - used manual query string

expectations.text: Both services use the same fetcher (NamedFetcher registered with same name)
Child service properly inherits from parent service
